# pexip_infinity_mjx_endpoint_group (Resource)

Manages an MJX endpoint group. An MJX endpoint group defines the system location and One-Touch Join Profile for a set of OTJ endpoints.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_mjx_endpoint_group" "example" {
  name            = "Main Office Endpoints"
  system_location = pexip_infinity_system_location.example.id
  mjx_integration = pexip_infinity_mjx_integration.example.id
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of this OTJ Endpoint Group. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `system_location` (String) The system location of the Conferencing Nodes which will provide One-Touch Join services for this Endpoint Group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) An optional description of this OTJ Endpoint Group. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `disable_proxy` (Boolean) Bypass the web proxy when sending requests to Cisco OBTP Endpoints in this OTJ Endpoint Group.
- `mjx_integration` (String) The One-Touch Join Profile to which this Endpoint Group belongs.

### Read-Only

- `endpoints` (Set of String) The endpoints that belong to this Endpoint Group.
- `id` (String) Resource URI for the MJX endpoint group.
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the MJX endpoint group.
